title: When is someone going to address the correlation between the steady use of hair dye and breast cancer.
body: I'm 53 years old, with black hair that is 5 - 10% gray and I hate it.  I, myself am Black and wouldn't look 53 if it weren't for that the little gray hairs.  But all, ALL the women I know that have breast cancer and or succumbed to breast cancer were avid users of hair dye.  And I'm not talking about henna.
